goal: Rebase the web design UI back toward the source render package and owner correction spec while preserving command/runtime boundaries.
design_authority: private external references only as non-authoritative adaptation background

private_reference_note.result: A generic private reference query timed out and contributed no adopted repo decision.
private_reference_note.repo_trace_policy: No service names, URLs, screenshots, tokens, install notes, or private research notes are recorded.

changed_files.change: restored mono-first typography and source-render spacing/control proportions
updated static visual guard to assert SF Mono visual authority

visual_rebase_decisions.after: SF Mono mono-first UI token with mono fallback stack
visual_rebase_decisions.reason: source render package and owner correction spec use SF Mono as the visual baseline

visual_rebase_decisions.before: responsive logo width drifted between 104 and 132 px
visual_rebase_decisions.reason: source render package uses fixed 112 px brand mark in the sidebar

visual_rebase_decisions.before: header gap and margin were compressed after stabilization
visual_rebase_decisions.after: 24 px header gap and 24 px header margin restored
visual_rebase_decisions.reason: closer to source render package while keeping responsive containment

visual_rebase_decisions.before: buttons and inputs used 38 px height and tighter horizontal padding
visual_rebase_decisions.after: 40 px primary control height and wider button padding restored
visual_rebase_decisions.reason: matches source render package control rhythm

visual_rebase_decisions.after: system column restored to 496 px baseline
visual_rebase_decisions.reason: aligns overview grid with source render package

visual_rebase_decisions.before: KPI cards were shorter with heavier numeric weight
visual_rebase_decisions.after: 112 px minimum height and semibold numeric weight
visual_rebase_decisions.reason: warmer editorial hierarchy without making all text medium/bold
closer to original modal proportions and owner type scale

preserved_stabilization: stale/error action ledger states remain visually distinct

observations: overview live screen loaded with heading Обзор and live-readonly footer
accounts screen loaded with heading Аккаунты
validate_account for acct-active was confirmed once
action ledger showed status ok and live refresh ok
truth note preserved canonical refreshed JSON requirement
diagnostics screen loaded as support-artifact view
settings screen loaded as command-packet bounded view
setup/select/import screens loaded with inert deferred copy
browser_smoke.tool_note: A long multi-screen browser script timed out, then the smoke was split into shorter successful checks.
